summary: Rebuilt crystalField as a lattice-aligned faceted cluster. Created `latticeCluster.ts` generator that places hexagonal bipyramid crystals on HCP/BCC lattice nodes with shared orientation and per-crystal tilt. Updated `crystalField.ts` to use the lattice generator instead of `generateVolumetricPoints`, adding `aLatticePos` and `aFacetNormal` geometry attributes plus `uLatticePulse`, `uFacetShimmer`, `uHasLatticePos`, `uHasFacetNormal` uniforms. Vertex shader now drives lattice-coherent bass pulse (crystals expand as units along their lattice vector) and treble facet shimmer (per-point displacement along facet normals). Fragment shader uses `vFacetNormal` for pseudo-Lambertian facing-dependent brightness, creating visible flat-shaded edges. Registered new uniforms in `shaderRegistry.ts`. Updated adaptive point count test to accommodate lattice-aligned counts. All 2320 tests pass, build succeeds.
